pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 6, export_result.sh line 6 - DOMAIN variable set consistently throughout codebase
setup_task.sh line 7, export_result.sh line 7 - USER variable set consistently, created by virtualmin create-domain command

setup_task.sh line 40 (chown reference), export_result.sh line 9 (DOCROOT) - Both construct path from user variable, standard Virtualmin installation pattern

privileged_info_summary: The task fixes Virtualmin validation errors on the virtual server 'broken-app.test' owned by user 'broken-app'. The setup intentionally corrupts the server by: (1) changing /home/broken-app/public_html ownership to root:root, and (2) deleting the Apache configuration at /etc/apache2/sites-available/broken-app.test.conf. The verifier checks that the agent uses Virtualmin's validate-domains command to identify errors, then fixes ownership to broken-app:broken-app and restores the config file with correct ServerName directive. Successful completion requires validation exit code 0.
